description_long: This storage box features a trapezoidal profile with a series of horizontal brown slats on the front, resembling wooden planks, and smooth gray panels on the sides and back. The front face is visually dominant with its rich brown color and subtle rectangular highlights, suggesting a wood-like texture. The sides are thin and gray, providing a strong contrast to the front and back. The back is composed of evenly spaced gray slats, giving a clean and modern appearance. The top appears flat and solid, with no visible hinges, handles, or openings, indicating a simple, robust construction. The overall design suggests durability and suitability for use in garages, storage rooms, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A trapezoidal storage box with brown slatted front and gray paneled sides and back, featuring a flat top and robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows brown horizontal slats with subtle highlights, giving a wood-like appearance.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin, gray panel profile and the layered construction of the box.
description_view_2: Back view displays evenly spaced gray slats, contrasting with the brown front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the thin gray panel and layered structure.
